message:
test(proptest): update property-based tests to match ARS API changes

Updates 17 proptest files to align with the ARS module API changes in the
preceding commit. ~571 diff lines total:

- proptest_ars_blast_radius: updated for maturity tier graduation metrics
  and new token-bucket configuration fields
- proptest_ars_generalize: adjusted strategies for refactored
  generalization pipeline and template generation types
- proptest_ars_drift: updated for new drift detection API signatures
- proptest_ars_secret_scan: expanded test coverage for new secret patterns
- proptest_ars_symbolic_exec: updated path coverage assertions
- proptest_ars_evidence: adjusted for enhanced Bayes Factor types
- proptest_context_snapshot: updated for new context snapshot fields
- proptest_mdl_extraction: formatting fixes for MDL extraction types
- Remaining 9 files: minor import/type adjustments to match API changes
  in their corresponding ARS modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+            graduated_burst: gb,

+            graduation_threshold: 5,
+            veteran_threshold: 20,
+            demotion_failure_count: 3,
+        })
 }
 
 fn arb_reflex_state() -> impl Strategy<Value = ReflexState> {
-    (arb_tier(), 0..100u64, 0..50u64, 0..10u64, "[a-z]{2,6}")
-        .prop_map(|(tier, successes, failures, consec, cluster)| ReflexState {
+    (arb_tier(), 0..100u64, 0..50u64, 0..10u64, "[a-z]{2,6}").prop_map(
+        |(tier, successes, failures, consec, cluster)| ReflexState {
             tier,
             successes,
             failures,
             consecutive_failures: consec,
             cluster_id: cluster,
-        })
+        },
+    )
 }
